name: stoTracker Application
objective: Build stoTracker: Java 21 Spring Boot + Thymeleaf app with SQLite, LCARS UI, tracking name/dilithium/credits/recruitment/conversion/event data with JUnit tests and git pre-commit hook
exit_criteria: Application compiles and starts without errors
Main page displays table with name|dilithium|credits|recruitment|convertion|event columns
Add name form in header works
Remove button shows confirmation dialog and deletes data
Footer shows current time in HH:mm format
On load displays most recent data
Git pre-commit hook runs tests and fails if tests fail
